stories.title: 60 (or 70?) home runs? What Kyle Schwarber's early...
stories.summary: The Phillies slugger is thumping homers at a historic pace. Here's what his early stats say about how many he can belt by the end of the 2026 season.

stories.title: LIV to pitch new model amid bankruptcy report
stories.summary: LIV Golf is moving forward with its plan to take a new business model to potential investors despite a report that the league is laying groundwork for potential bankruptcy in the U.S.

stories.title: Makar out Game 1 of Western Conference finals
stories.summary: Avalanche star defenseman Cale Makar will miss Game 1 of the Western Conference finals against the Golden Knights on Wednesday.

stories.title: Knicks flip script, attack Harden to spark rally
stories.summary: The Knicks flipped the script on the Cavaliers in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference finals, as Jalen Brunson sparked a historic rally by relentlessly targeting James Harden.

stories.title: Chiefs' Rice violates probation, ordered to jail
stories.summary: Chiefs receiver Rashee Rice has been sentenced to immediately serve 30 days in jail after testing positive for marijuana in violation of the terms of his probation.
